top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns ON ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_sold_date_sk = sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    d_year,
    d_moy
ORDER BY 
    d_year,
    d_moy
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    d_year AS year,
    d_moy AS month,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    d_year, d_moy
ORDER BY 
    d_year, d_moy
LIMIT 100

    d_year,

    LEFT JOIN store_returns ON ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_sold_date_sk = sr_returned_date_sk
